channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Spring 2026 School of Engineering Midterm Student Course Evaluations Now Open
item.description: Date: Wednesday, February 25, 2026 (all day) - Spring 2026 School of Engineering (SoE) Midterm course evaluations are now open. Your feedback is very important to the Institute and the school, so please complete the SoE midterm evaluation surveys for all your courses! Evaluations will be available through Friday, March 13, 2026.
item.author: Students

item.title: Success Lab: Motivation & Change I
item.description: Date: Tuesday, March 17, 2026 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM - Do you put things off until the last minute only to be disappointed by the outcome? Learn how to develop and maintain motivation to achieve goals to make change in your life. Whether you want to spend more time on school work or learn to play the piano, making change requires a specific set of steps to ensure success.
item.author: Students

item.title: Passover Kosher Meals - Sign Up before March 26th
item.description: Passover is approaching, and we are now accepting sign-ups for Kosher meals for Passover. Please make sure to register no later than Thursday, March 26, 2026. Click the link above for more information and how to sign up.
item.author: Students

item.title: March Events with Rensselaer Dining
item.description: There’s a lot happening this March—join us for great food, fun events, and opportunities to connect with the campus dining community. Click the link above for the full schedule of events!
item.author: Students

item.title: Student Culinary Council Meeting - March 18th
item.description: Join Rensselaer Dining on March 18th at 3:30 pm in the Student Union Room 1602 for our Student Culinary Council Meeting. Complimentary Starbucks for the first 10 students and all participants are entered into a raffle for a FREE Jimmy John’s catering package. We hope to see you there. Be sure to follow Rensselaer Dining on social media @rensselaerdining
item.author: Students

item.title: NYS Assembly Internship Info Session
item.description: We’re excited to announce that a representative from the New York State Assembly will be visiting campus. Undergraduate and Graduate students are invited to stop by, meet our guest, and learn more about their work serving communities across New York State. The NYS Assembly Internship Program offers undergraduate and graduate students the chance to gain real‑world experience in legislative offices. Stop by on March 17 from 4-5pm in Sage 4304.
item.author: Students

item.title: RPI Student Film Festival: Submit Your Film!
item.description: The RPI Student Film Festival is back for its fifth annual celebration of student creativity, presented by UPAC Cinema and the Arts Department. This festival provides university-level filmmakers a platform to exhibit their work, bridging cinematic production with critical social, scientific, and intellectual discourse. We are now seeking short film submissions from student creators. Deadline for Entry: March 31, 2026
item.author: Students

item.title: Success Center Hosting Review Sessions Week of 3/15-3/22
item.description: Week of 3/15- 3/22: Need some last minute review for your upcoming exam? Stop by for a Puck Cookie and a Review Session with our Success Center Tutors! MAU: Sunday, 3/15 (5-7pm) at the Success Center CAL II: Monday, 3/16 (7-9pm) in the Nason Classroom CHEM I: Tuesday, 3/17 (5-6pm) at the Success Center CHEM II: Tuesday, 3/17 (7-8pm) at the Success Center Computer Science I: Tuesday, 3/17 (8-10pm) in the Nason Classroom Diff Eq: Wednesday, 3/18 (7-9pm) at the Success Center
item.author: Students

item.title: Get Ready for your Exams in the Success Center
item.description: Join us March 9-12 to prepare for upcoming exams this week! Drop-in Sessions: Calculus II - 7-9pm Essence of Engineering Mechanics - 7-9pm Multivariable Calculus - 7-9pm IEA - 7-9pm Data Structures - 8-10pm
item.author: Community

item.title: Webinar Friday March 20: Carousel Digital Signage
item.description: Join Jim Evans, Director of MultiMedia Services, on Friday March 20 from 11am-12pm, for a hands-on training session and learn how to create and publish slides on RPI’s digital signage system, Carousel Digital Signage. Whether you’re promoting a lecture, club event, or campus initiative—this session will help you get your message on screens across RPI. Register now: https://rensselaer.webex.com/webappng/sites/rensselaer/webinar/webinarSeries/register/783d951c6ab8482e9198a7bd6075a700
item.author: Community

item.title: Jofa’s Birthday Paw-ty
item.description: Date: Monday, March 16, 2026 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM - Join Presidential Pup Jofa to celebrate her 5th Birthday. Free Cupcakes. Stop by to pet or just say Happy Birthday!! Bring along any donation of pet food/pet product and receive free gift. All items collected will be donated for local animal needs.
item.author: Community

item.title: Celebrating Our Recognition as a Most Promising Place to Work in Student Affairs
item.description: The Division of Student Experience has been nationally recognized as one of the Most Promising Places to Work in Student Affairs awarded by College Student Educators International (ACPA) and the EDU Ledger. Each year, only a select number of colleges and universities nationwide receive this distinction, underscoring its highly competitive and selective nature. This year, RPI was honored as one of just 30 institutions to earn this award.
item.author: Community

item.title: School of Science Presents: Diversifying Funding Sources (RSVP)
item.description:
Date: Wednesday, March 18, 2026 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM - Hosted by the School of Science, this session will focus on identifying and pursuing funding to support research. Presentations from OVPR, OSAT, and Foundation Philanthropy will highlight campus resources, funding tools, and strategies for securing foundation, industry, private donor, state, and federal support. Please RSVP using the provided link or contact Sibel Adali (sibel@cs.rpi.edu) for more information. Light refreshments will also be…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
